name: Lemon Chive Pepper Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 to 1 tsp Coarsely ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease the bottoms of 12 muffin cups or line them with paper baking cups.
3. Sift flour into a medium bowl and set aside.
4. In the same bowl, mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, pepper, salt, lemon peel, and chives.
5. Add milk, oil, and beaten egg to the dry ingredients. Stir just until combined.
6. Fill each prepared muffin cup about 3/4 full with batter.
7. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the muffins to cool for 1 minute before removing them from the cups.
9. Serve 12 muffins.
